title: Manisuris clarkei
taxonomy: Manisuris clarkei is classified within the family Apiaceae, which includes plants commonly known as carrot or parsley family. This classification places Manisuris clarkei among other plants with similar characteristics, such as compound leaves and umbrella-shaped flowers. The genus Manisuris is relatively rare and limited, consisting of a small number of species. Further research is needed to fully understand the evolutionary relationships within the Manisuris genus. Manisuris clarkei's classification within the broader plant kingdom is as a flowering plant, belonging to the kingdom Plantae.
